rationale: The supporting claim from 2023-06-15 reports 87.5% on MMLU, but a more recent extraction from 2024-09-01 reports only 81.2% for the same model — internal inconsistency that the belief statement does not reflect.

counter_claims.raw_excerpt: A later supporting claim (2024-09-01) reports 81.2% on MMLU, contradicting the older 87.5% figure used in the belief.
